data.name: Monster Girl Fantasy 2: Exposed
data.detailed_description:
The girls from Monster Girl Fantasy are back and they have brought new friends with them! But there's trouble in the paradise. Some of the girls have gone missing and there is a mysterious demon trying to suck their sexual energy. Will you be able to rescue the monster girls and protect them? Who will stand by your side, when everything is laid bare?

Key Features

  • No Random Encounters! Will you sneak past your enemies or fight your way through? The choice is yours!
  • Surprise your enemies! Ambush your enemies by attacking them from behind. But be careful not to leave your own back vulnerable...
  • Exotic fantasy world filled with unique creatures and monster girls!
  • Wide variety of weapons and spells to help you dispatch your enemies!
  • Full enjoyable experience in native English!

data.short_description: Monster Girl Fantasy 2 is an RPG that takes you on an exciting journey of companionship and desire! Can you protect the monster girls from a mysterious demon who wishes to expose everything that the girls are hiding?
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
